title: School Admin Assistant (West)
description:
Job Scope:

  • Front desk reception duties such as answering/ transferring phone calls and attending to walk-in parents/students/vendors.
  • Issuing of keys to staff if require the use of special rooms.
  • Record details of students and attend to students who are unwell at sickbay.
  • Contact parents to update student who is unwell.
  • Record details of students who leave school early due to sickness and/or have medical appointment and ensure that Early Dismissal form is completed.
  • Record details of lost & found Items in the Lost & Found form and track movements at the end of every school term.
  • Receive delivery items and inform staff on collection from General Office.
  • Collate list of students who have not collected their testimonials.
  • Manage the movement of school uniform on loan to students.
  • Distribute the mailers and any other materials required.
  • Prepare and count food coupons for payment if required.
  • Perform any ad-hoc administrative duties when required.

Requirements:

  • 3 years of relevant experience in administration in a school environment
  • Full GCE ‘N’ Level Certificate or its equivalent with a pass in English
  • Valid first aid with CPR certification
  • Proficient with Microsoft Office
  • Good communication and inter-personal skills with patience and ability to remain calm during challenging situations
  • Possess initiative, good problem-solving skills and ability to multitask
  • Able to work independently and collaborate in a team

Working Hours: 
Mondays to Thursdays: 9:30am to 6:30pm, inclusive of 0.5 hr lunch break
Fridays: 10 am to 6:30pm, inclusive of 0.5 hr lunch break
*Service not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays

Contract Period: 01 Apr 2026 to 31 Mar 2027 (Option to extend to 31 Mar 2028)

Salary: $1980-$2100/month

Location: Commonwealth

EA License No.: 96C4864

Reg No.: R26159658 BRANN LEONG CHUN HOE
